name: hippocampal asymmetry metrics
description: Quantitative assessment of hippocampal asymmetry index for seizure and sclerosis evaluation.

attributes.name: left hippocampus volume
attributes.description: Absolute volume of the left hippocampus.

attributes.name: right hippocampus volume
attributes.description: Absolute volume of the right hippocampus.

attributes.name: left % of ICV
attributes.description: Percentage of intracranial volume occupied by the left hippocampus.

attributes.name: right % of ICV
attributes.description: Percentage of intracranial volume occupied by the right hippocampus.

attributes.name: left normative percentile
attributes.description: Age- and sex-adjusted normative percentile for left hippocampus volume.

attributes.name: right normative percentile
attributes.description: Age- and sex-adjusted normative percentile for right hippocampus volume.

attributes.name: left-right asymmetry index
attributes.description: Percentage difference between left and right hippocampal volumes divided by their mean.
